verses.geez: ወካዕበ፡ ሶበ፡ ይፌኑ፡ ሰብአ፡ ይዕርግ፡ ሀመረ፡ ውስተ፡ ባሕር፡ እንዘ፡ ይፈቅድ፡ ይንግድ፡ ውስተ፡ ፀዋጋት፡ ሞገዳት፡ ይስእል፡ ወይጸርህ፡ ኀበ፡ ዕፅ፡ ዘየኃሥር፡ ወይደክም፡ እምሐመር፡ እንተ፡ ትፀውሮ።

translations.lxx: Again, one preparing himself to sail, and about to pass through the raging waves, calleth upon a piece of wood more rotten than the vessel that carrieth him.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ለዝኩ፡ ጣዖት፡ በፍትወተ፡ ረባኅ፡ ተኬንዎ፡ ወኬንያ፡ በጥበብ፡ ገብሮ።

translations.lxx: For verily desire of gain devised that, and the workman built it by his skill.

verses.geez: ወእንቲአከሰ፡ ኃዳፍ፡ ኦ፡ አብ፡ ትሠርዕ፡ ኵሎ፡ እስመ፡ ወሀብከ፡ ውስተ፡ ባሕር፡ ፍኖተ፡ ወውስተ፡ ሞገድ፡ አሠረ፡ ጽኑዐ፡ ታርኢ፡ ከመ፡ ትክል፡ ኵሎ፡ አድኅኖ፡ በጽድቅ።

translations.lxx: But thy providence, O Father, governeth it: for thou hast made a way in the sea, and a safe path in the waves;

verses.geez: ወበአዕርጎሂ፡ ውስተ፡ ሐመር፡ ወዘእንበለ፡ ኪንሂ፡ ዓዲ፡ አሕለፍከ፡ እስመ፡ ትፈቅድ፡ ከመ፡ ኢይኩን፡ ጽሩዐ፡ ምግባሪሃ፡ ለጥበብከ።

translations.lxx: shewing that thou canst save from all danger: yea, though a man went to sea without art.

verses.geez: በእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ይትአመኑ፡ ሰብእ፡ ነፍሶሙ፡ ውስተ፡ ዕፅ፡ ምኑን፡ ወኅሡር፡ ወይትዓደዉ፡ ማእከለ፡ መዋግድ፡ በሐመር፡ ንኡስ፡ ወበአርማስ፡ ወይድኅኑ።

translations.lxx: Nevertheless thou wouldest not that the works of thy wisdom should be idle, and therefore do men commit their lives to a small piece of wood, and passing the rough sea in a weak vessel are saved.

verses.geez: ወቀዲሙኒ፡ እመ፡ ተኀጒሉ፡ ዕቡያን፡ ረዓይት፡ ውስተ፡ ዕፅ፡ ተስፋ፡ ዓለም፡ ተፀዊሮ፡ ወተፀዊኖ፡ ድኅነ፡ ወኀደገ፡ ለዓለም፡ ዘርአ፡ ትውልድ፡ ተኀዲፎ፡ በእደ፡ ዚአከ።

translations.lxx: For in the old time also, when the proud giants perished, the hope of the world governed by thy hand escaped in a weak vessel, and left to all ages a seed of generation.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ተባረክ፡ ዕፅ፡ በዘቦቱ፡ ይትገበር፡ ጽድቅ።

translations.lxx: For blessed is the wood whereby righteousness cometh.

verses.geez: ወዘበዕበድሰ፡ ተገብረ፡ ርጉም፡ ውእቱ፡ ወዘገብሮኒ፡ እስመ፡ ውእቱ፡ ግብር፡ በላዪ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወዘይማስን፡ አምላከ፡ ተሰምየ።

translations.lxx: But that which is made with hands is cursed, as well it, as he that made it: he, because he made it: and it, because, being corruptible, it was called God.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ዕሩየ፡ ተጸልኡ፡ በኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ረሲዕኒ፡ ወርስዓት።

translations.lxx: For the ungodly and his ungodliness are both alike hateful unto God.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ግብር፡ ዘተገብረ፡ ምስለ፡ ገባሪሁ፡ ይትኴነን።

translations.lxx: For that which is made shall be punished together with him that made it.

verses.geez: ወበእንተዝ፡ ሐተታ፡ ይከውን፡ በኀበ፡ ጣዖቶሙ፡ ለአሕዛብ።

translations.lxx: Therefore even upon the idols of the Gentiles shall there be a visitation: because in the creature of God they are become an abomination, and stumblingblocks to the souls of men, and a snare to the feet of the unwise.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ተገብረ፡ ፍጥረት፡ ለአኅጒሎ፡ ወማዕቅፈ፡ ለነፍሳተ፡ ሰብእ፡ ወመሥገርተ፡ ለአእጋረ፡ ሰብእ፡ ዓብዳን፡ እስመ፡ ቀዳሚሃ፡ ለዝሙት፡ ሐል፡ ውስተ፡ ፈጣሪሁ፡ ለጣዖት።

translations.lxx: For the devising of idols was the beginning of spiritual fornication, and the invention of them the corruption of life.

verses.geez: ወረኪቦቱ፡ ሙስናሃ፡ ለሕይወት፡ እስመ፡ ኢሀሎ፡ እምፍጥረት፡ ወኢይሄሉ፡ ለዓለም።

translations.lxx: For neither were they from the beginning, neither shall they be for ever.

verses.geez: ወበምክንያተ፡ ሰብእ፡ ከንቱ፡ ቦአ፡ ውስተ፡ ዓለም፡ ከመዝ፡ በእንተ፡ ዘያፈጥን፡ ፍጻሜ፡ ኅልፈተ፡ ምስጠቶሙ።

translations.lxx: For by the vain glory of men they entered into the world, and therefore shall they come shortly to an end.

verses.geez: ወእምዝ፡ ሐለዩ፡ በጊረ፡ ጣዖት፡ እስመ፡ አብ፡ ይፄዓር፡ ወይላሁ፡ ላዕለ፡ ዘአሐዱ፡ ሎቱ፡ እስመ፡ እንዘ፡ ቆዑ፡ ተመሥጠ፡ ሕፃኑ፡ ፍጡነ።

translations.lxx: For a father afflicted with untimely mourning, when he hath made an image of his child soon taken away, now honoured him as a god, which was then a dead man, and delivered to those that were under him ceremonies and sacrifices.

verses.geez: አምሳለ፡ ዘገብሩ፡ ሎቱ፡ ቀዲሙ፡ ለዘሞተ፡ ሰብእ፡ ይእዜሰ፡ ከመ፡ አምላክ፡ አክበርዎ፡ ወወሀብዎ፡ ቅኑያን፡ ለኃጢአት፡ በዓላተ፡ በጉሃን፡ ወመሥዋዕተ፡ ምሥጢር።

translations.lxx: Thus in process of time an ungodly custom grown strong was kept as a law, and graven images were worshipped by the commandments of kings.

verses.geez: ወእምዝ፡ በርኅቀተ፡ መዋዕል፡ ተእኅዘ፡ ልማደ፡ እብሰት፡ ወርስዐት፡ ወከመ፡ ዘሕግ፡ ዓቀብዎ፡ ወበትእዛዘ፡ መኳንንት፡ እኩያን፡ አምለክዎሙ፡ ለግልፎዋት፡ ወለእለ፡ ይትከሀሎሙ፡ ለሰብእ፡ ያክብርዎሙ፡ በቅድመ፡ ገጾሙ።

translations.lxx: Whom men could not honour in presence, because they dwelt far off, they took the counterfeit of his visage from far, and made an express image of a king whom they honoured, to the end that by this their forwardness they might flatter him that was absent, as if he were present.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ርኁቀ፡ ሀለዉ፡ ወመሰሉ፡ ገጾሙ፡ ዘርኁቅ፡ መልክዑ፡ ወገብሩ፡ ለንጉሥ፡ ዘክቡር፡ በኀቤሆሙ፡ አምሳለ፡ ክሡተ፡ ለዘኢሀሎ፡ ከመ፡ ዘሀሎ።

translations.lxx: Also the singular diligence of the artificer did help to set forward the ignorant to more superstition.

verses.geez: ያስተበቊዕ፡ በጻሕቅ፡ ወለእለሂ፡ ኢአምሩ፡ ስሕተቶሙ፡ ፀንዑ፡ በአምልኮቶሙ፡ ወሜጡ፡ ክብረ፡ ኬንያ፡ ውስተ፡ ኪነ፡ እደ፡ ሰብእ።

translations.lxx: For he, peradventure willing to please one in authority, forced all his skill to make the resemblance of the best fashion.

verses.geez: ወቦ፡ ካዕበ፡ ዘይፈቅደ፡ ያድሉ፡ ወያሥምሮ፡ ለነጋሢ፡ አኃዚ፡ ተጠናቀቀ፡ ለገቢረ፡ አምሳሉ፡ በዘይሤኒ፡ ወበዘይኄይስ።

translations.lxx: And so the multitude, allured by the grace of the work, took him now for a god, which a little before was but honoured as a man.

verses.geez: ወበውእቱ፡ ተስሕበ፡ ሰብእ፡ ብዙኅ፡ በእንተ፡ ፍሥሐሆሙ፡ በሥነ፡ ላህየ፡ ምግባር፡ ወለብእሲ፡ ዘሀሎ፡ እምቅድመ፡ መዋዕል፡ በንስቲት፡ ክብር፡ ይእዜሰ፡ ከመ፡ አምላክ፡ ረሰይዎ።

translations.lxx: And this was an occasion to deceive the world: for men, serving either calamity or tyranny, did ascribe unto stones and stocks the incommunicable name.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ፡ ኮነ፡ መሥገርተ፡ ዓለም፡ እስመ፡ ሰብእ፡ ተቀንየ፡ ሎቱ፡ በምንዳቤ፡ አው፡ በአገብሮ።

translations.lxx: Moreover this was not enough for them, that they erred in the knowledge of God; but whereas they lived in the great war of ignorance, those so great plagues called they peace.

verses.geez: ወረሰዩ፡ ስሞ፡ ለአምላክ፡ ዘአልቦቱ፡ ሱታፌ፡ ለዕፅ፡ ወለእብን፡ ዘይረብኅዎሙ።

translations.lxx: For whilst they slew their children in sacrifices, or used secret ceremonies, or made revellings of strange rites;

verses.geez: ዓዲ፡ ኢእከሎሙ፡ ስሕተቶሙ፡ እምኢያእምሮ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አላ፡ እንዘሂ፡ ሀለዉ፡ ውስተ፡ ፀብዕ፡ ዓቢይ፡ ዘመጠነዝ፡ ሕያዋን፡ በፅበዶሙሰ፡ ለዘመጠነዝ፡ እኩይ፡ ረሰይዎ፡ ወሰመይዎ፡ ሰላመ።

translations.lxx: they kept neither lives nor marriages any longer undefiled: but either one slew another traiterously or grieved him by adultery.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ እለ፡ ሀለዉ፡ ይቀትሉ፡ ደቂቆሙ፡ ወይገብሩ፡ ኅቡእ፡ ምሥጢረ፡ አው፡ የሐልዩ፡ ወጺኦሙ፡ እንዘ፡ ያንጎግዉ፡ በካልእ፡ ሥርዓት፡ ኢ፡ ፍናዊሆሙ።

translations.lxx: So that there reigned in all men without exception, blood, manslaughter, theft, and dissimulation, corruption, unfaithfulness, tumults, perjury,

verses.geez: ወኢ፡ ሰብሳቦሙ፡ ዓቀቡ፡ እንከ፡ ዳዕሙ፡ ካልእ፡ ይቀትሎ፡ ለካልኡ፡ ወእመ፡ አኮ፡ ይየውሆ፡ ወያስተሴፍዎ፡ በዘያደውዮ።

translations.lxx: disquieting of good men, forgetfulness of good turns, defiling of souls, changing of kind, disorder in marriages, adultery, and shameless uncleanness.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ፡ ምግባራቲሆሙ፡ ድሙር፡ ውስተ፡ ደም፡ ወቀትል፡ ወስርቅ፡ ወሕብል፡ ወሙስና፡ ወሕፀተ፡ አኰቴት፡ ወኢ፡ አሚን፡ ወመሐላ።

translations.lxx: For the worshipping of idols not to be named is the beginning, the cause, and the end, of all evil.

verses.geez: ወሀዊከ፡ ሠናይ፡ ወኢተዘክሮ፡ ዕሤት፡ ግማኔ፡ ነፍስ፡ ወሙያጤ፡ ልደት፡ ንስተተ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ሰብሳብ፡ ዝሙት፡ ወርኵስ።

translations.lxx: For either they are mad when they be merry, or prophesy lies, or live unjustly, or else lightly forswear themselves.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ አምልኮ፡ ጣዖት፡ እለ፡ አልቦሙ፡ ስም፡ ውእቱ፡ ጥንተ፡ ኵሉ፡ እከይ፡ ወምክንያተ፡ ፍጻሜሁ፡ እስመ፡ እለ፡ ያመልክዎሙ፡ ለእለ፡ ተፈሥሑ፡ ወየዓብዱ፡ ወይቀትሉ፡ ውሉዶሙ።

translations.lxx: For insomuch as their trust is in idols which have no life, though they swear falsely, yet they look not to be hurt.

verses.geez: ወእመ፡ አኮ፡ ይትኔበዩ፡ ወይሔስዉ፡ ሐሰተ፡ ወእመ፡ አኮ፡ የሐይዉ፡ ኅርቱመ፡ ወእመ፡ አኮ፡ ይምሕሉ፡ ፍጡነ።

translations.lxx: Howbeit for both causes shall they be justly punished: both because they thought not well of God, giving heed unto idols, and also unjustly swore in deceit, despising holiness.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ እለ፡ እንበለ፡ ነፍስ፡ ይትአመኑ፡ ጣዖተ፡ ሕስወ፡ ወበሀመ፡ እለ፡ አልቦሙ፡ ንባብ፡ ወአእምሮ፡ አምሳለ፡ ፈጣሪ፡ ዘየአምር፡ ኵሎ፡ እስመ፡ አመ፡ መሐሉ፡ ይትኰነኑ፡ ኢይሴፈዉ።

translations.lxx: For it is not the power of them by whom they swear: but it is the just vengeance of sinners, that punisheth always the offence of the ungodly.

verses.geez: ኅቡረ፡ ይረክቦሙ፡ ኵነኔ፡ ዘበጽድቅ፡ እስመ፡ ሐለዩ፡ እኩየ፡ በእግዚአብሔር፡ አመ፡ ነጸሩ፡ ጣዖተ፡ ወግፍዐ፡ መሐሉ፡ ቦቱ፡ በሕብል፡ አስተአኪዮሙ፡ ጽድቀ፡ ፈጣሪ።
እስመ፡ አኮ፡ በእንተ፡ ኃይልከ፡ ዘመሐሉ፡ ቦቱ፡ ዳዕሙ፡ ለአኅልፎ፡ ኵነኔ፡ አበሳሆሙ፡ ትምጻእኬ፡ እንከ፡ ኵነኔ፡ ዲበ፡ ዕልወቶሙ፡ ለገፋዕያን፡ ዘልፈ።
